section_analysis.description: Theatrical narrative. Focus on the 'unknown folk-tale'. Fast but controlled.
High-velocity explosion. 'Shiranai' (Don't know) negation motif. Maximum dramatic intensity.

lyrics.original: 知らない知らない 僕は何も知らない
lyrics.romaji: Shiranai shiranai boku wa nanimo shiranai

lyrics.original: 誰も知らない おとぎばなしは 夕焼けの中に吸い込まれて消えてった
lyrics.romaji: Daremo shiranai otogibanashi wa yuuyake no naka ni suikomarete kietetta
lyrics.meta: Core thematic line. Cinematic/Tragic disappearance imagery.

stylistic_dna.vocal_texture: IA - High pitch, dramatic, clear and powerful
stylistic_dna.main_instrument: Fast Rock Drums, Slap Bass, Orchestral Hits, Piano
